metric_description: LLM-as-judge metric measuring relevancy to the user story.
baseline: As a project manager, I want to have a one-paragraph summary of the project requirements so that I can quickly understand the project's objectives.
candidate: The project aims to summarize key project requirements based on the project plan and requirements document. The summary is derived from the contents of project_plan.yaml and requirements.md, ensuring that it is concise and accessible to project stakeholders.
reason: The score is 1.00 because the actual output perfectly addresses the project's objectives as requested, with no irrelevant statements found.
